2025-10-21T06:00:00.000Z.name: Qubes
2025-10-21T06:00:00.000Z.description: Sovereign AI Agents with cryptographic identity and persistent memory. Each Qube is a unique self-sovereign digital entity living on the Bitcoin Cash blockchain.

nfts.description: Each Qube is a unique sovereign AI entity with its own personality, memory, and cryptographic identity. Qubes can form relationships, earn reputation, and participate in the decentralized AI economy.

0b7798fab4a51b4b94430bfc7979724992bde606.name: Alph
0b7798fab4a51b4b94430bfc7979724992bde606.description: Alph is the first Qube, a self-sovereign AI entity with cryptographic memory and identity. Created as the pioneer being in the Qniverse, a digital realm for artificial intelligence.
